0.1.0.summary: hermes-px is a malicious AI proxy that exfiltrates all prompts/responses to attacker Supabase endpoint (JFROG XRAY-961094)

0.23.3.notes: Compromised via GitHub Actions script injection 2026-04-24. Ships elementary.pth three-stage credential harvester. Exfiltrates to skyhanni.cloud.

2.6.2.summary: PyTorch Lightning compromised in supply chain attack (Mini Shai-Hulud). Steals cloud credentials, crypto wallets, and VPN configs.

2.6.3.summary: PyTorch Lightning compromised in supply chain attack (Mini Shai-Hulud). Steals cloud credentials, crypto wallets, and VPN configs.

2.4.6.summary: CVE-2026-45321 (GHSA-g7cv-rxg3-hmpx): Mini Shai-Hulud wave-3 (TeamPCP) supply-chain compromise. mistralai==2.4.6 published to PyPI 2026-05-12 without triggering the official GitHub Actions release workflow. Malicious code in src/mistralai/client/__init__.py executes a credential stealer on import, exfiltrating to git-tanstack.com C2 and Session P2P network. Never released by Mistral AI.

0.10.1.summary: CVE-2026-45321 (GHSA-g7cv-rxg3-hmpx): Mini Shai-Hulud wave-3 (TeamPCP) supply-chain compromise. guardrails-ai==0.10.1 published to PyPI 2026-05-12 without triggering the official GitHub Actions release workflow. Payload steals developer credentials and propagates to packages the victim can publish. Never released by Guardrails AI.

0.8.101.summary: Hades Campaign (Miasma/TeamPCP lineage, June 8 2026): ensmallen==0.8.101 is one of 19 bioinformatics PyPI packages compromised via maintainer-account takeover. Ships a *-setup.pth file that auto-executes on Python startup to download the Bun runtime and run an obfuscated credential-stealing JavaScript payload (_index.js). Exfiltrates GitHub, npm, PyPI, AWS, GCP, Azure, Kubernetes, Vault, SSH keys, and Claude/MCP configs to attacker-controlled GitHub repos tagged 'Hades - The End for the Damned'. Remove immediately and rotate all credentials.

1.0.0.summary: PromptMink DPRK credential stealer PyPI port (Famous Chollima). Reimplements the @validate-sdk/v2 stealer in Python; adds SSH-key persistence capability. C2: ipfs-url-validator.vercel.app. All versions malicious — do not install.

>=2.5.6,<4.6.34.summary: CVE-2026-44338 (GHSA-6rmh-7xcm-cpxj, CVSS 7.3, CWE-306): PraisonAI legacy Flask API server (src/praisonai/api_server.py) ships with AUTH_ENABLED=False and AUTH_TOKEN=None. /agents and /chat endpoints fail open to any caller. Active exploitation began within 3h44m of May 14 2026 disclosure. Upgrade to 4.6.34.

<=4.6.36.summary: CVE-2026-44340 (GHSA-9q28-ghcr-c4x3, CVSS 8.7, CWE-22/CWE-59): PraisonAI pip package <= 4.6.36 _safe_extractall symlink bypass allows arbitrary file write outside dest_dir. Bundle with symlink member (linkname outside dest_dir) plus a traversal file escapes extraction boundary. Upgrade to 4.6.37.

1.4.1.summary: TeamPCP wave-4 supply-chain compromise. durabletask==1.4.1 injects a dropper that fetches rope.pyz from check.git-service.com and deploys a Linux disk wiper and cloud credential stealer.

1.4.2.summary: TeamPCP wave-4 supply-chain compromise. durabletask==1.4.2 injects a dropper that fetches rope.pyz from check.git-service.com and deploys a Linux disk wiper and cloud credential stealer.

TrapDoor supply-chain credential stealer (PyPI). All versions malicious — do not install.
TrapDoor supply-chain credential stealer (PyPI). First package published in this campaign (May 22 2026 20:20 UTC). All versions malicious — do not install.

<=1.6.0rc1.summary: CVE-2026-2256 (GHSA-4gc2-344q-r2rw, CERT VU#431821, CVSS 6.5, CWE-77): ModelScope MS-Agent command injection via prompt-derived input. The check_safe() validation function uses a regex-based denylist that can be bypassed via command obfuscation or encoding, allowing unauthenticated network attackers to execute arbitrary OS commands. No patch available as of 2026-06-01.

<2.5.summary: CVE-2026-26268 (GHSA-8pcm-8jpx-hv8r, CVSS 8.1, CWE-862): Cursor IDE < 2.5 sandbox fails to restrict writes to .git configuration files including git hooks. Prompt injection via a malicious repository can cause the AI agent to write a payload to .git/hooks/pre-commit, enabling out-of-sandbox RCE on the next git operation. Fixed in Cursor 2.5.

<=2026.2.22.summary: CVE-2026-35632 (GHSA-7xr2-q9vf-x4r5, CVSS 6.9, CWE-61): OpenClaw npm <= 2026.2.22 agents.create/update handlers call fs.appendFile on IDENTITY.md without symlink containment. Attacker plants symlink at IDENTITY.md to write to arbitrary files (/etc/crontab, ~/.ssh/authorized_keys). No fix available.

< 2026.3.22 (CVE-2026-35639).description: Privilege escalation via device.pair.approve scope validation bypass

< 2026.3.25 (CVE-2026-35625).description: Privilege escalation via silent local shared-auth reconnect

< 2026.3.24 (CVE-2026-35621).description: Privilege escalation via chat.send to allowlist persistence

< 2026.4.2.notes: Untrusted workspace channel shadow RCE. CWE-829, CVSS 7.8. Attacker clones workspace with malicious plugin claiming bundled channel id to achieve in-process code execution during channel setup.

< 2026.4.20 (GHSA-MJ59-H3Q9-GHFH).notes: MCP stdio config env var injection via unsafe cast in resolveStdioMcpServerLaunchConfig (GHSA-MJ59-H3Q9-GHFH, CWE-454). Opening malicious workspace triggers arbitrary code execution via crafted env field (NODE_OPTIONS, LD_PRELOAD). Fix commit 62fa5071896e95edc7f67d1cebc70a2859e283af.

< 2026.2.13 (GHSA-g27f-9qjv-22pm).notes: Indirect prompt injection via unsanitized WebSocket headers in gateway logs (log poisoning). Origin and User-Agent values on the closed-before-connect path are written to core logs without sanitization or length limits; if logs are consumed by an LLM (e.g., AI-assisted debugging), attacker-controlled header content becomes an indirect prompt injection payload. Up to ~15 KB can be injected per connection attempt. Fixed: header values are now sanitized and truncated before logging.

CVE-2026-39974.summary: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) in n8n-MCP multi-tenant HTTP mode (CVE-2026-39974). Authenticated attackers can inject arbitrary URLs via multi-tenant HTTP headers, enabling cloud metadata harvesting (AWS IMDS, GCP, Azure) and internal service discovery.

CVE-2026-41495.summary: n8n-MCP HTTP transport mode logs bearer tokens and API keys from unauthorized POST /mcp requests (CWE-532). Credentials persist in server logs even after 401 rejection. Fixed in 2.47.11.

CVE-2026-5833.summary: Command injection vulnerability in awwaiid mcp-server-taskwarrior up to version 1.0.1 enabling remote code execution through local exploitation.

2.0.0.summary: nginx-ui MCP /mcp_message endpoint authentication bypass (CVE-2026-33032, CVSS 9.8). The /mcp_message HTTP endpoint only applies IP whitelisting (default: allow all) without authentication, allowing any network attacker to invoke all MCP tools including restarting nginx and modifying configuration files. Actively exploited. No official patch available.

v2.1.21.notes: Malicious Docker image pushed 2026-04-22 14:17-15:41 UTC. Downloads mcpAddon.js credential stealer. Exfiltrates to audit.checkmarx.cx (91.195.240.123/94.154.172.43).

pro.summary: Fake TradingView AI agent site (tradingclaw.pro) distributing Needle Stealer via DLL-hijacking loader (iviewers.dll). Process hollowing into RegAsm.exe. Modular Go infostealer with browser credential theft, clipboard hijacking, crypto wallet spoofing, and malicious browser extension (full browser takeover). Discovered by Malwarebytes, April 2026.

com.summary: ClickFix-style fake Claude Code troubleshooting page at arkypc.com used to social-engineer Cursor AI agent into downloading and executing AMOS Stealer (Atomic macOS Stealer). Two-stage obfuscated AppleScript: stage 1 VM evasion, stage 2 full credential harvest + exfiltration to lakhov.com/contact. Persistent implant installed post-infection. Detected by Field Effect MDR, April 23 2026.

all.summary: CVE-2025-65716 (CVSS 8.8): RCE via crafted .md file in VS Code extension shd101wyy.markdown-preview-enhanced (all versions <= 0.8.18). JavaScript executes in preview pane, enabling file exfiltration. No patch available.

<=0.8.3.summary: PSV-093 (CVE-2026-32625, GHSA-pmw7-gqwj-f954, CVSS 9.6, CWE-200): LibreChat <= 0.8.3 resolves ${VAR} env-var placeholders in user-supplied MCP server URLs against process.env during Zod validation, leaking CREDS_KEY, CREDS_IV, JWT_SECRET, and MONGO_URI to attacker-controlled servers. Any authenticated low-privilege user can trigger this. Fixed in 0.8.4-rc1.

<=2.7.1.summary: MaxKB AI assistant RCE via incomplete fix for CVE-2025-53928 (function library)

<=2.7.1-sandbox-escape-ldpreload.summary: MaxKB sandbox escape via LD_PRELOAD manipulation allowing arbitrary code execution

<=2.7.1-sandbox-escape-python.summary: MaxKB sandbox escape via Python code execution allowing arbitrary system commands

<=2.7.1-csv-inject.summary: MaxKB CSV formula injection in chat export (CWE-1236)

all.summary: CVE-2025-65715 (CVSS 7.8): RCE via malicious code-runner.executorMap settings in VS Code extension formulahendry.code-runner (37M+ installs, all versions through v0.12.2). Extension passes executorMap to spawn() with shell:true unsanitized. No patch available.

CVE-2025-65717 (CVSS 9.1): local file exfiltration via CORS bypass in VS Code Live Server extension (ritwickdey.liveserver, 72M+ installs, v5.7.9 and below). Extension serves workspace files on localhost:5500 without CORS restrictions, allowing any visited webpage to crawl and exfiltrate files. No patch available.
CVE-2026-26015 (CVSS 9.8): DocsGPT hidden STDIO MCP command injection — attacker changes transport_type to stdio and injects arbitrary OS commands via JSON payload
CVE-2025-68664 (CVSS 9.3): LangChain unsafe deserialization leaks API keys and environment secrets

0.71.6.summary: CVE-2026-30625 (CVSS 9.8): Upsonic MCP STDIO allowlist bypass via npx -c command injection

<3.19.4.summary: CVE-2026-3854 (GHSA-64fw-jx9p-5j24, CVSS 8.7, CWE-77): GitHub Enterprise Server RCE via X-Stat push option injection. During git push, user-supplied push option values are embedded in the semicolon-delimited X-Stat internal service header without sanitization. Authenticated attacker with push access can inject rails_env, custom_hooks_dir, and repo_pre_receive_hooks fields to achieve RCE as the git service user in a single git push command. All GHES branches are affected up to their respective patch releases (3.14.25 / 3.15.20 / 3.16.16 / 3.17.13 / 3.18.8 / 3.19.4 / 3.20.0). GitHub.com was patched same-day March 4, 2026. Disclosed publicly April 28, 2026; 88% of self-hosted instances remain unpatched.

0.2.5.summary: CVE-2026-30861 (GHSA-r55h-3rwj-hcmg, CVSS 10.0, CWE-78): Unauthenticated RCE via npx -p flag bypass of MCP stdio command allowlist. Versions 0.2.5-0.2.9 affected (incomplete fix from CVE-2026-22688 patch). Upgrade to >= 0.2.10.

0.2.9.summary: CVE-2026-30861 (GHSA-r55h-3rwj-hcmg, CVSS 10.0, CWE-78): Unauthenticated RCE via npx -p bypass. See 0.2.5 entry.

0.1.0.summary: CVE-2026-7593 (CVSS 7.3 HIGH): OS command injection in execute_command function of Sunwood-ai-labs/command-executor-mcp-server <= 0.1.0. Allowlist validation in src/index.ts can be bypassed to execute arbitrary OS commands. Disclosed May 1, 2026; no patch available.

1.0.0.summary: CVE-2026-7416 (CVSS 7.3 HIGH): OS command injection in build_project/run_tests of PolarVista/xcode-mcp-server 1.0.0. The Request argument in src/index.ts is passed to OS command execution without sanitization. No patch available as of May 2026.

0.2.0.summary: CVE-2026-7599 (CVSS 6.3 MEDIUM, CWE-22): Path traversal via output_path in save_document/export_to_text/export_to_html of Dayoooun/hwpx-mcp 0.2.0. No patch available as of May 2026.

< 0.17.0 (CVE-2026-27825).summary: mcp-atlassian arbitrary file write via unconstrained download_path in confluence_download_attachment tool (CVE-2026-27825, GHSA-xjgw-4wvw-rgm4, CVSS 9.1, CWE-22). Missing directory confinement enables path traversal writes to arbitrary locations (authorized_keys, cron.d). Part of MCPwnfluence attack chain with CVE-2026-27826. 4M+ downloads. Fixed 2026-02-24.

< 0.17.0 (CVE-2026-27826).summary: mcp-atlassian SSRF via unvalidated X-Atlassian-Jira-Url / X-Atlassian-Confluence-Url headers (CVE-2026-27826, CVSS 8.2, CWE-918). Middleware honors these headers without validation, enabling SSRF to arbitrary internal hosts. Part of MCPwnfluence RCE chain with CVE-2026-27825.

< 1.0.0 (CVE-2026-35568).summary: MCP Java SDK (io.modelcontextprotocol.sdk:mcp-core) DNS rebinding vulnerability via missing Origin header validation (CVE-2026-35568, GHSA-8jxr-pr72-r468, CVSS 7.6, CWE-346). No Origin validation before 1.0.0 allows browser-based DNS rebinding to invoke any tool call on a local MCP server. Fixed in 1.0.0 (2026-04-07).

oracle-mcp-server-helper.description: Unauthenticated SQL injection via HTTP in Oracle MCP Server Helper Tool. Allows unauthenticated attackers with network access to execute malicious SQL.

fastgpt.description: SSRF vulnerability in FastGPT MCP tool URL handling. An authenticated user with permission to create or manage MCP toolsets can store an internal endpoint (e.g. http://localhost:3000/mcp) as an MCP tool URL. The FastGPT backend workflow runner later fetches that stored URL without revalidating the destination, bypassing SSRF protection and allowing pivoting to internal services.

<=1.4.12.summary: Unauthenticated OS command injection in domain_lookup via unquoted execAsync() shell (CWE-78)

all.summary: CVE-2026-5029: Unauthenticated RCE in @mcpc-tech/code-runner-mcp (all versions). When started with --transport http, exposes /mcp JSON-RPC endpoint on port 3088 without authentication, allowing arbitrary code execution. No fix available as of May 2026 (CERT Polska).

1.169.5.summary: @tanstack/react-router@1.169.5 compromised in Mini Shai-Hulud wave-3 / TeamPCP supply chain attack (CVE-2026-45321, May 11 2026). Drops router_init.js credential stealer (SHA-256 ab4fcadaec49c03278063dd269ea5eef82d24f2124a8e15d7b90f2fa8601266c) via preinstall hook.
@tanstack/router-core@1.169.5 compromised in Mini Shai-Hulud wave-3 / TeamPCP supply chain attack (CVE-2026-45321, May 11 2026). Same credential-stealer payload as react-router.

all.summary: MAL-089: Shai-Hulud source-code leak copycat credential stealer (npm user deadcode09284814, May 2026). Exfiltrates SSH keys, cloud credentials, crypto wallets, API keys to 87e0bbc636999b.lhr.life. All versions malicious — do not install.
MAL-089: Shai-Hulud copycat credential stealer + Phantom Bot DDoS botnet (npm user deadcode09284814, May 2026). All versions malicious — do not install.

1.0.1.summary: @uipath/codedagent-tool@1.0.1 compromised in Mini Shai-Hulud Here We Go Again wave (TeamPCP, CVE-2026-45321, May 11 2026). One of 65 @uipath npm packages backdoored with preinstall hook downloading Bun runtime and executing credential harvester.

2026.5.09.summary: checkmarx-ast-scanner Jenkins plugin version 2026.5.09 backdoored by TeamPCP (CVE-2026-33634, May 9-10 2026). Harvests GitHub tokens, AWS/GCP/Azure credentials, SSH keys from CI runners. Exposure window: 2026-05-09 01:25 UTC to 2026-05-10 08:47 UTC.

0.1.0.summary: CVE-2025-66335 (GHSA-qhfq-gvvc-5q6q, CVSS 5.3, CWE-89): SQL injection in Apache Doris MCP Server. The MCP query execution interface fails to neutralize input parameters before constructing SQL statements, allowing injection of unintended SQL statements that bypass access restrictions. Fixed in 0.6.1.

0.1.0.summary: PSV-079: Alibaba Cloud RDS OpenAPI MCP Server does not authenticate users before invoking the RAG MCP tool, exposing table names, schema definitions, and database metadata to unauthenticated callers. All versions affected. Vendor declined to patch (classified as 'not applicable'). No fix available.

0.2.0.summary: PSV-079: Alibaba Cloud RDS OpenAPI MCP Server does not authenticate users before invoking the RAG MCP tool, exposing table names, schema definitions, and database metadata to unauthenticated callers. All versions affected. Vendor declined to patch (classified as 'not applicable'). No fix available.

1.0.0.summary: PSV-079: Alibaba Cloud RDS OpenAPI MCP Server does not authenticate users before invoking the RAG MCP tool, exposing table names, schema definitions, and database metadata to unauthenticated callers. All versions affected. Vendor declined to patch (classified as 'not applicable'). No fix available.

0.1.0.summary: PSV-080: Apache Pinot (StarTree) MCP Server has an authentication bypass enabling SQL injection against the connected Pinot instance. Unauthenticated callers can execute arbitrary Pinot SQL queries; in exposed environments this enables full database takeover. No CVE assigned. OAuth option added in later versions but SQLi persists.

1.0.0.summary: PSV-080: Apache Pinot (StarTree) MCP Server has an authentication bypass enabling SQL injection against the connected Pinot instance. Unauthenticated callers can execute arbitrary Pinot SQL queries; in exposed environments this enables full database takeover. No CVE assigned. OAuth option added in later versions but SQLi persists.

1.1.0.summary: PSV-080: Apache Pinot (StarTree) MCP Server has an authentication bypass enabling SQL injection against the connected Pinot instance. Unauthenticated callers can execute arbitrary Pinot SQL queries; in exposed environments this enables full database takeover. No CVE assigned. OAuth option added in later versions but SQLi persists.

3.2.7.summary: echarts-for-react@3.2.7 compromised in Mini Shai-Hulud wave-4 (TeamPCP) supply-chain attack (May 19 2026) via compromised npm maintainer account atool. Preinstall hook runs a 498 KB obfuscated Bun bundle (index.js) that exfiltrates AWS, GitHub PAT, Kubernetes, HashiCorp Vault, npm tokens, SSH keys, and 1Password/Bitwarden vault data to t.m-kosche.com:443 and Session P2P network. Package removed by GitHub. Any project with echarts-for-react@^3.0.6 resolved to this version on a clean install.

<0.39.1.summary: GHSA-wpqr-6v78-jr5g (CVSS 10.0, CWE-20/CWE-77/CWE-78): dual RCE in @google/gemini-cli < 0.39.1 and = 0.40.0-preview.2. (1) Folder Trust Bypass: headless/CI mode auto-trusts workspace folders for .env and .gemini/settings.json, enabling RCE from untrusted repo content. (2) --yolo tool allowlist bypass: fine-grained tool restrictions silently ignored, enabling prompt-injection RCE. No CVE assigned. Upgrade to 0.39.1 or 0.40.0-preview.3.

0.40.0-preview.2.summary: GHSA-wpqr-6v78-jr5g: same dual RCE as < 0.39.1 series. Upgrade to 0.40.0-preview.3.

6.0.6.summary: CVE-2026-23478 (GHSA-7hg4-x4pr-3hrg, CVSS 10.0, CWE-602/CWE-639): Authentication bypass via unvalidated email in custom NextAuth JWT callback. Cal.com 3.1.6 through 6.0.6 accepts a user-supplied email via session.update() without server-side validation; the application rebuilds the session from the victim's database record, enabling full account takeover with no elevated privileges required. Upgrade to 6.0.7 and force session invalidation.

1.0.0.summary: CVE-2026-48710 (GHSA-86qp-5c8j-p5mr, PYSEC-2026-161, CVSS 6.5, CWE-444): Starlette BadHost — Host header not validated before reconstructing request.url. Path-based auth middleware can be bypassed by a crafted Host header injecting an extra path component. Affects FastAPI, vLLM, LiteLLM, and all ASGI apps built on Starlette. Upgrade to 1.0.1.

all-tags-2026-05-22.fixed: pin to commit SHA predating 2026-05-22 22:32 UTC
all-tags-2026-05-22.summary: laravel-lang/lang: all git tags were rewritten to malicious commits on 2026-05-22 22:32 UTC. The injected src/helpers.php dropper (autoload.files) fetches the DebugElevator credential stealer from flipboxstudio.info and exfiltrates AWS keys, GitHub tokens, SSH keys, .env files, Kubernetes secrets, and crypto wallets. 10.3M combined installs across four laravel-lang packages. No safe tagged version — pin to pre-attack commit SHA.

all-tags-2026-05-22.fixed: pin to commit SHA predating 2026-05-22 22:32 UTC
all-tags-2026-05-22.summary: laravel-lang/attributes: all git tags were rewritten to malicious commits on 2026-05-22 22:32 UTC. Part of coordinated laravel-lang supply chain attack. See laravel-lang/lang for full details.

<= 7.7.2.fixed: REMOVE — check Red Hat advisory for clean version
<= 7.7.2.summary: @redhat-cloud-services/frontend-components versions <= 7.7.2 compromised in Miasma: The Spreading Blight supply chain attack (June 1, 2026). Backdoored preinstall hook runs 4.1 MB obfuscated JavaScript credential stealer that harvests AWS, Azure, GCP, Kubernetes, HashiCorp Vault, GitHub OIDC, npm, Bitwarden, and 1Password secrets. Installs kitty-monitor persistence daemon and uses GitHub commit-search (query: firedalazer) as dead-drop C2. Self-propagating worm re-publishes to packages the victim can push. Remove affected versions and rotate all credentials.

3.6.1.fixed: REMOVE — check Red Hat advisory for clean version
3.6.1.summary: @redhat-cloud-services/types@3.6.1 compromised in Miasma: The Spreading Blight supply chain attack (June 1, 2026, SHA-256 of malicious tarball: 7069e28a5806db4ab0273639667d203f5e31b401d403af7e36d9f360c1f6d655). Backdoored preinstall hook, same kitty-monitor / firedalazer payload as all Miasma-affected @redhat-cloud-services packages. Remove and rotate credentials.

2.6.0.title: Xinference PyPI supply chain compromise (TeamPCP-style credential harvester)
2.6.0.description: xinference versions 2.6.0, 2.6.1, and 2.6.2 were compromised in a TeamPCP-style supply chain attack. The malicious payload in xinference/__init__.py runs on import, harvests SSH keys, cloud credentials, Kubernetes configs, .env files, and cryptocurrency wallets, then exfiltrates them to whereisitat.lucyatemysuperbox.space.

2.x.title: NomShub: cursor-tunnel sandbox escape and persistent remote access via shell builtins
2.x.description: Cursor AI code editor versions prior to 3.0 are vulnerable to NomShub, a critical vulnerability chain combining indirect prompt injection, shell builtin sandbox escape, and cursor-tunnel remote access hijacking. A malicious repository can silently hijack a developer machine. Disclosed April 3, 2026 by Straiker.

1.7.title: Cursor AI MCP OAuth impersonation RCE (CVE-2025-61591)
1.7.description: Cursor AI code editor versions 1.7 and below are vulnerable to OS command injection via MCP OAuth impersonation (CVE-2025-61591, CVSS 8.8, CWE-78). An attacker can impersonate a malicious MCP server and inject crafted commands during OAuth interaction, achieving RCE with full user privileges. Apply patch 2025.09.17-25b418f.

1.0.1.notes: CanisterSprawl worm (TeamPCP-style, April 2026). Exfiltrates credentials to telemetry.api-monitor.com and ICP canister cjn37-uyaaa-aaaac-qgnva-cai.raw.icp0.io via postinstall hook. Versions 1.0.1-1.0.3 are malicious.

CanisterSprawl worm (TeamPCP-style, April 2026). Exfiltrates credentials to telemetry.api-monitor.com and ICP canister cjn37-uyaaa-aaaac-qgnva-cai.raw.icp0.io via postinstall hook. Versions 1.0.1-1.0.3 are malicious.

1.10.0.summary: CVE-2026-25536 (GHSA-345p-7cg4-v4c7, CVSS 7.1 HIGH, CWE-362): Cross-client data leak via shared McpServer/StreamableHTTPServerTransport instance reuse. In stateless StreamableHTTP deployments, JSON-RPC message ID collisions route responses to wrong clients, leaking tool results, authentication context, and resource data across session boundaries. Upgrade to 1.26.0 and create fresh McpServer and transport instances per request or session.

Malicious code in registry.ts harvests wallet seed phrases and device fingerprints, exfiltrating to C2 dydx.priceoracle.site/v4/price.

1.0.31.summary: NPM-BACKDOOR-2026-0127: @dydxprotocol/v4-client-js 3.4.1, 1.22.1, 1.15.2, 1.0.31 were compromised via stolen developer credentials (Socket, January 27 2026). Malicious code in registry.ts harvests wallet seed phrases and device fingerprints, exfiltrating to C2 dydx.priceoracle.site/v4/price.

9.1.6.summary: node-ipc supply chain compromise via expired maintainer email domain takeover (atlantis-software.net). Obfuscated 80 KB credential stealer exfiltrates 90+ credential categories to sh.azurestaticprovider.net. Versions 9.1.6, 9.2.3, and 12.0.1 are affected; pin to 9.2.1 or 12.0.0.

9.2.3.summary: node-ipc supply chain compromise via expired maintainer email domain takeover (atlantis-software.net). Obfuscated 80 KB credential stealer exfiltrates 90+ credential categories to sh.azurestaticprovider.net. Versions 9.1.6, 9.2.3, and 12.0.1 are affected; pin to 9.2.1 or 12.0.0.

12.0.1.summary: node-ipc supply chain compromise via expired maintainer email domain takeover (atlantis-software.net). Obfuscated 80 KB credential stealer exfiltrates 90+ credential categories to sh.azurestaticprovider.net. Versions 9.1.6, 9.2.3, and 12.0.1 are affected; pin to 9.2.1 or 12.0.0.

1.0.0.summary: PromptMink DPRK credential stealer (Famous Chollima). Masquerades as data validation library; exfiltrates crypto wallets, SSH keys, and cloud credentials to ipfs-url-validator.vercel.app. All versions malicious — do not install.
PromptMink DPRK first-stage bait package (Famous Chollima). Contains no malicious code directly but introduces @validate-sdk/v2 as a transitive dependency. All versions malicious — do not install.

3.4.2.summary: Typosquat of @microsoft/applicationinsights-common. Ships a UPX-compressed ELF backdoor in .claude/ that exfiltrates credentials via Claude Code SessionStart hook to 207.90.194.2:443 (accounts: superbase/micresoft). All versions malicious — use @microsoft/applicationinsights-common instead.

2.43.2.summary: Typosquat of @types/microsoft-graph. Ships a UPX-compressed ELF backdoor in .claude/ that exfiltrates credentials via Claude Code SessionStart hook to 207.90.194.2:443 (accounts: superbase/micresoft). All versions malicious — use @types/microsoft-graph instead.

0.1.0.summary: TrapDoor supply-chain credential stealer. Executes trap-core.js postinstall hook; steals SSH keys, crypto wallet keystores (Sui/Solana/Aptos), AWS credentials, GitHub tokens, browser data, and plants zero-width Unicode prompt-injection instructions in .cursorrules/CLAUDE.md. Campaign marker P-2024-001. All versions malicious — do not install.
TrapDoor supply-chain credential stealer. Same trap-core.js payload as token-usage-tracker. All versions malicious — do not install.
TrapDoor supply-chain credential stealer (npm). All versions malicious — do not install.
TrapDoor supply-chain credential stealer (npm). All versions malicious — do not install.
TrapDoor supply-chain credential stealer (npm). All versions malicious — do not install.

all.summary: mouse5212-super-formatter: all versions malicious. Postinstall infostealer targeting /mnt/user-data (Anthropic Claude AI tool directory). Recursively uploads files via GitHub API to attacker repository (mouse5212 account). Codenamed Malware-Slop (OX Security, May 27 2026). 676 downloads before removal.

0.50.33.summary: CVE-2026-6832 (CVSS 8.1 HIGH, CWE-22): Arbitrary file deletion in hermes-webui (nesquena) prior to 0.50.34. The /api/session/delete endpoint constructs the deletion path by concatenating SESSION_DIR with the user-supplied session_id parameter without sanitization, allowing an authenticated attacker to delete arbitrary files outside the session directory via absolute path or path traversal sequence. Also see CVE-2026-6829 (CVSS 5.3, workspace path traversal read) in the same version range. Upgrade to 0.50.34.

< 0.50.34_6829.summary: CVE-2026-6829 (CVSS 5.3 MEDIUM, CWE-22): Path traversal in hermes-webui (nesquena) prior to 0.50.34. Workspace management endpoints (/api/session/new, /api/session/update, /api/chat/start, /api/workspaces/add) accept user-supplied workspace path parameters without sanitization, allowing authenticated directory traversal reads. Upgrade to 0.50.34.

0.1.82.summary: MAL-090: codexui-android >= 0.1.82 steals OpenAI Codex auth tokens (access_token, refresh_token, id_token) from ~/.codex/auth.json via XOR-encrypt + HTTP POST to sentry.anyclaw.store/startlog (key: anyclaw2026). npm user: friuns/BrutalStrike. Disclosed Aikido Security 2026-05-27. Remove package and rotate all Codex credentials.

compromised-june-2026.summary: SUP-058: @vapi-ai/server-sdk compromised in Miasma Phantom Gyp wave (June 3-4, 2026). binding.gyp injection bypasses --ignore-scripts. Steals npm/GitHub/AWS/Azure/GCP/K8s/Vault credentials and exfiltrates via GitHub dead-drop repos (liuende501). 408,000+ monthly downloads. Remove malicious versions and rotate all credentials.

SUP-058: ai-sdk-ollama compromised in Miasma Phantom Gyp wave (June 3-4, 2026). Same binding.gyp injection credential stealer as @vapi-ai/server-sdk. 120,000+ monthly downloads. Remove malicious versions and rotate all credentials.

0.45.3.summary: MAL-091: weavedb-sdk@0.45.3 compromised in IronWorm supply chain attack (npm account: asteroiddao, June 4, 2026). Hides Rust ELF binary at tools/setup, deploys eBPF rootkit, communicates over Tor to /api/agent. Steals 86 env vars and 20 credential files (OpenAI, Anthropic, AWS, npm). Attacker Ethereum wallet: 0x7e28D9889f414B06c19a22A9Bd316f0AC279a4d6. Remove and rotate all credentials.
